prompt: Using @examples/docs/sample.md, explain what /plan changes in the Xcode REPL and name one kind of action it blocks.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, summarize what /act --clear saves, how it forks the session, and how the approved plan is passed to the next prompt.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, describe what /tool NAME INPUT is for and whether it bypasses permission or risk checks.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, explain how @relative/path file references are injected into a REPL prompt and name one blocked sensitive path category.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, summarize what the git preflight block gives the agent before coding tasks and how dirty files should be treated.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, explain how the REPL renders final Markdown answers and what fallback it uses when rich is unavailable.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, list the three categories that Tab completion supports in the Xcode REPL.
Using @examples/docs/sample.md, describe the default Xcode runtime path and name the core tools available in the slim path.
